name: PHP & MySQL (ICMCS)
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y mariadb-server && sudo service mariadb start && (sudo mysql -e "CREATE USER IF NOT EXISTS 'root'@'127.0.0.1' IDENTIFIED BY ''; GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON *.* TO 'root'@'127.0.0.1' WITH GRANT OPTION; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;" || true) && (sudo rm -rf /var/www/html || true) && (sudo ln -sf /workspaces/ict-complaint-and-management-system /var/www/html || true)
